statusLine.command: bash -lc 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; input=$(cat); project_dir=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.project_dir // .workspace.current_dir // .cwd // empty"); script="$project_dir/agents_extensions/shared/statusline/statusline.sh"; if [ -n "$project_dir" ] && [ -f "$script" ]; then printf "%s" "$input" | bash "$script"; fi'

subagentStatusLine.command: bash -lc 'command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; input=$(cat); project_dir=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.project_dir // .workspace.current_dir // .cwd // empty"); script="$project_dir/agents_extensions/shared/statusline/subagent-statusline.sh"; if [ -n "$project_dir" ] && [ -f "$script" ]; then printf "%s" "$input" | bash "$script"; fi'
